Class JPARoleManager

java.lang.Object
jpa.JPARoleManager
All Implemented Interfaces:
RoleManager
public class JPARoleManager extends Object implements RoleManager

      Creates a new role in the system.
      Specified by:
      createRole in interface RoleManager
      Parameters:

    • findRoleByName

      public Role findRoleByName(String roleName)
      Finds a role by its name.
      Specified by:
      findRoleByName in interface RoleManager
      Parameters:
      roleName - the name of the role
      Returns:
      the role object if found, null otherwise

      Finds a role by its ID.
      Specified by:
      findRoleById in interface RoleManager
      Parameters:
      id - the ID of the role
      Returns:
      the role object if found, null otherwise

      public List<Role> getAllRoles()
      Retrieves all roles in the system.
      Specified by:
      getAllRoles in interface RoleManager
      Returns:
      a list of all roles

    • updateRole

      public void updateRole(Role role)
      Updates an existing role in the system.
      Specified by:
      updateRole in interface RoleManager
      Parameters:
      role - the role object with updated information

    • delateRole

      public void delateRole(Integer id)
      Deletes a role from the system by its ID.
      Specified by:
      delateRole in interface RoleManager
      Parameters:
      id - the ID of the role to delete
